notes: Riverboat piles + items. Most items are food + drink — the boat traffics in hospitality. No bindle analogue; the Empress wins by FEEDING THE TABLE, not by assembling an object.

fresh_bread.title: Fresh Bread
fresh_bread.flavor: Pulled from the galley oven an hour ago. The crust is still warm.

river_fish.title: River Fish
river_fish.flavor: Caught off the upper deck this afternoon. Clean. Whole.

wine_bottle.title: Wine
wine_bottle.flavor: A bottle the boat has been holding for a year and a season.

jar_pickled_summer.title: Jar · Pickled Summer
jar_pickled_summer.flavor: Labeled in Nicola's hand. Last summer's tomato + cucumber + dill.

jar_strawberry_jam.title: Jar · Strawberry Jam
jar_strawberry_jam.flavor: The strawberries from the upper deck, two seasons ago.

tin_of_tea.title: Tin of Tea
tin_of_tea.flavor: The good stuff. Loose-leaf. The lid has a hand-stamped river on it.

herbs_basket.title: Herbs · Basket
herbs_basket.flavor: Basil, thyme, mint — fresh-cut from the upper deck.

tomato_handful.title: Tomatoes
tomato_handful.flavor: Still warm from the upper deck.

rose_cutting.title: Rose · Cutting
rose_cutting.flavor: A small cutting from the upper-deck rosebush. Roots within the week.

old_radio_log.title: Old Radio Log
old_radio_log.flavor: Pages of dates + frequencies in Nicola's grandmother's hand.

spare_chart.title: Spare River Chart
spare_chart.flavor: A chart of the river from 1979. The bank is in different places.
